summary: Iteration 20: Backpack migration from Equipment to Armor tab. 18/18 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. 4 backpacks removed from Equipment, 26 CStone backpack sets added to Armor. Armor returns 81 items (55 armor + 26 backpacks). Equipment returns 26 items. Backpack cards correctly hide temperature/radiation stats.

critical_code_review_comments: personal_gear.py correctly adds 26 backpack entries to ARMOR_SETS with type='Backpack', temp/radiation=0
armor_enhancer.py correctly implements fetch_cstone_backpack_images(), get_backpack_image(), get_backpack_variant_images(), get_backpack_variant_data()
gear.py routes correctly uses backpack-specific functions for type='Backpack' items
PersonalGear.jsx ArmorCard correctly hides stats for Backpack type with `{armor.type !== 'Backpack' && ...}`
PersonalGear.jsx GearDetailModal correctly hides armor stats for Backpack type with `isArmor && item.type !== 'Backpack'`
Backpack sets with many variants: Strata (12), Morozov-CH (11), Stirling Exploration (9), Palatino (8), Geist (7), Testudo (7)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - CStone API provides backpack images dynamically via GetArmors/Backpacks endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 migrated backpacks from Equipment to Armor tab. Total armor now 81 items (55 armor sets + 26 backpacks). Equipment now 26 items. All 26 backpacks have CStone images. Backpack cards and modals correctly hide temperature/radiation stats. Backpack filter button appears in Armor tab. Sets with many variants: Strata Backpack (12), Morozov-CH Backpack (11), Stirling Exploration Backpack (9), Palatino Backpack (8), Geist Backpack (7), Testudo Backpack (7). Test user: e1agent/test123.
